headline: Seahawks look to move down in NFL draft, willing to deal in NFC West
description: The Super Bowl champion Seahawks are looking to trade down in this year's NFL draft -- "it's no secret with us," general manager John Schneider said Monday -- and are not opposed to making deals within their division.
